      <tr class="thead" data-row="103">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>
         <th aria-label="Player" data-stat="player" class=" sort_default_asc left">Player</th>
         <th aria-label="Nation" data-stat="nationality" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Nationality of the player.&lt;br&gt;First, we check our records in international play at senior level.&lt;br&gt;Then youth level.&lt;br&gt;Then citizenship presented on wikipedia.&lt;br&gt;Finally, we use their birthplace when available.">Nation</th>

         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="207">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>
         <th aria-label="Player" data-stat="player" class=" sort_default_asc left">Player</th>
         <th aria-label="Nation" data-stat="nationality" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Nationality of the player.&lt;br&gt;First, we check our records in international play at senior level.&lt;br&gt;Then youth level.&lt;br&gt;Then citizenship presented on wikipedia.&lt;br&gt;Finally, we use their birthplace when available.">Nation</th>
         <th aria-label="Position" data-stat="position" class=" center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Position&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Position most commonly played by the player&lt;br&gt;GK - Goalkeepers&lt;br&gt;DF - Defenders&lt;br&gt;MF - Midfielders&lt;br&gt;FW - Forwards&lt;br&gt;FB - Fullbacks&lt;br&gt;LB - Left Backs&lt;br&gt;RB - Right Backs&lt;br&gt;CB - Center Backs&lt;br&gt;DM - Defensive Midfielders&lt;br&gt;CM - Central Midfielders&lt;br&gt;LM - Left Midfielders&lt;br&gt;RM - Right Midfielders&lt;br&gt;WM - Wide Midfielders&lt;br&gt;LW - Left Wingers&lt;br&gt;RW - Right Wingers&lt;br&gt;AM - Attacking Midfielders&lt;br&gt;">Pos</th>
         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>

         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>
         <th aria-label="Age" data-stat="age" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Age at season start&lt;br&gt;Given on August 1 for winter leagues&lt;br&gt;and February 1 for summer leagues.">Age</th>

         <th aria-label="Nation" data-stat="nationality" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Nationality of the player.&lt;br&gt;First, we check our records in international play at senior level.&lt;br&gt;Then youth level.&lt;br&gt;Then citizenship presented on wikipedia.&lt;br&gt;Finally, we use their birthplace when available.">Nation</th>

         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="519">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>
         <th aria-label="Player" data-stat="player" class=" sort_default_asc left">Player</th>
         <th aria-label="Nation" data-stat="nationality" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Nationality of the player.&lt;br&gt;First, we check our records in international play at senior level.&lt;br&gt;Then youth level.&lt;br&gt;Then citizenship presented on wikipedia.&lt;br&gt;Finally, we use their birthplace when available.">Nation</th>
         <th aria-label="Position" data-stat="position" class=" center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Position&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Position most commonly played by the player&lt;br&gt;GK - Goalkeepers&lt;br&gt;DF - Defenders&lt;br&gt;MF - Midfielders&lt;br&gt;FW - Forwards&lt;br&gt;FB - Fullbacks&lt;br&gt;LB - Left Backs&lt;br&gt;RB - Right Backs&lt;br&gt;CB - Center Backs&lt;br&gt;DM - Defensive Midfielders&lt;br&gt;CM - Central Midfielders&lt;br&gt;LM - Left Midfielders&lt;br&gt;RM - Right Midfielders&lt;br&gt;WM - Wide Midfielders&lt;br&gt;LW - Left Wingers&lt;br&gt;RW - Right Wingers&lt;br&gt;AM - Attacking Midfielders&lt;br&gt;">Pos</th>
         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="623">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>
         <th aria-label="Player" data-stat="player" class=" sort_default_asc left">Player</th>
         <th aria-label="Nation" data-stat="nationality" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Nationality of the player.&lt;br&gt;First, we check our records in international play at senior level.&lt;br&gt;Then youth level.&lt;br&gt;Then citizenship presented on wikipedia.&lt;br&gt;Finally, we use their birthplace when available.">Nation</th>
         <th aria-label="Position" data-stat="position" class=" center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Position&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Position most commonly played by the player&lt;br&gt;GK - Goalkeepers&lt;br&gt;DF - Defenders&lt;br&gt;MF - Midfielders&lt;br&gt;FW - Forwards&lt;br&gt;FB - Fullbacks&lt;br&gt;LB - Left Backs&lt;br&gt;RB - Right Backs&lt;br&gt;CB - Center Backs&lt;br&gt;DM - Defensive Midfielders&lt;br&gt;CM - Central Midfielders&lt;br&gt;LM - Left Midfielders&lt;br&gt;RM - Right Midfielders&lt;br&gt;WM - Wide Midfielders&lt;br&gt;LW - Left Wingers&lt;br&gt;RW - Right Wingers&lt;br&gt;AM - Attacking Midfielders&lt;br&gt;">Pos</th>
         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>
         <th aria-label="Age" data-stat="age" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Age at season start&lt;br&gt;Given on August 1 for winter leagues&lt;br&gt;and February 1 for summer leagues.">Age</th>
         <th aria-label="Year of birth" data-stat="birth_year" class=" center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Year of birth&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;">Born</th>

         <th aria-label="Goals" data-stat="goals" class=" center group_start" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Goals&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Goals scored or allowed">Gls</th>

         <th aria-label="Shots on Target" data-stat="shots_on_target" class=" center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Shots on Target&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Shots on Target&lt;br&gt;Note: Shots on target do not include penalty kicks">SoT</th>
         <th aria-label="Shots on Target %" data-stat="shots_on_target_pct" class=" hide_non_quals center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Shots on Target %&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Percentage of shots that are on target&lt;br&gt;Minimum .395 shots per squad game to qualify as a leader&lt;br&gt;Note: Shots on target do not include penalty kicks" data-filter="1" data-name="Shots on Target %">SoT%</th>

         <th aria-label="Shots on target/90" data-stat="shots_on_target_per90" class=" hide_non_quals center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Shots on target/90&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Shots on target per 90 minutes&lt;br&gt;Minimum 30 minutes played per squad game to qualify as a leader&lt;br&gt;Note: Shots on target do not include penalty kicks" data-filter="1" data-name="Shots on target/90">SoT/90</th>

         <th aria-label="Goals/Shot on Target" data-stat="goals_per_shot_on_target" class=" hide_non_quals center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Goals/Shot on Target&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;Goals per shot on target&lt;br&gt;Minimum .111 shots on target per squad game to qualify as a leader&lt;br&gt;Note: Shots on target do not include penalty kicks" data-filter="1" data-name="Goals/Shot on Target">G/SoT</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="727">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>
         <th aria-label="Player" data-stat="player" class=" sort_default_asc left">Player</th>
         <th aria-label="Nation" data-stat="nationality" class=" sort_default_asc center" data-tip="Nationality of the player.&lt;br&gt;First, we check our records in international play at senior level.&lt;br&gt;Then youth level.&lt;br&gt;Then citizenship presented on wikipedia.&lt;br&gt;Finally, we use their birthplace when available.">Nation</th>

         <th aria-label="Squad" data-stat="team" class=" sort_default_asc center">Squad</th>
